title: Strait of Hormuz Remains Near-Empty With Just A Few Iran Ships Moving
summary: - The Strait of Hormuz is observed to be near-empty of merchant traffic, with only a few Iran-linked vessels (two small fuel carriers and a tiny coastal cargo ship) detected exiting the waterway; no inbound traffic observed as of the report. - Iran’s tactics and international responses are shaping security dynamics: Iran is funneling exports by filling supe…

title: Hormuz Ceasefire Week One Maritime Intelligence Update
summary: - One week into the Hormuz ceasefire, the Strait of Hormuz has not returned to normal open navigation. Transit continues but under a layered, uncertain regime combining Iranian routing control and U.S. enforcement. - Access remains selective and inconsistent. Vessels must follow Iranian-approved corridors, with explicit warnings against unauthorized transit…
